_comment: AgriSync Voice Retained Storage - S3 Bucket Policy Template
USAGE: Replace ${env} with one of: dev | staging | prod
Apply with: aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket agrisync-voice-retained-${env} --policy file://bucket-policy.json --region ap-south-1
GUARANTEES (non-negotiable; verifier checks these in Wave 3):
1. Deny any PutObject lacking SSE-S3 server-side encryption (AES256).
2. Deny any request that does NOT use TLS (aws:SecureTransport=false).
3. Bucket-level Public Access Block + bucket-owner-enforced are applied
SEPARATELY via create-bucket.sh (they are bucket settings, not policy).
WHY DENY-ONLY: Allow-permissions for the backend role live in iam-policy.json,
attached to the role itself. The bucket policy enforces hard rails that bind
even if the role is over-broad. Defence in depth.
NOT IN v1: Cross-account access, VPC endpoint policy, KMS-key restriction.
Phase 07 may layer KMS CMK enforcement on top of SSE-S3.
